item.title: TheDublinPigeon: Talking Snooker reposteó The Dublin Pigeon @TheDublinPigeon · 24min En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker I think as it’s quit
item.description: Talking Snooker reposteó The Dublin Pigeon @TheDublinPigeon · 24min En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker I think as it’s quite novel at this stage, some players maybe not buying into it. I think as it becomes more of a mainstay and tradition, it’ll be custom to attend in the next few years. 1 1 89

item.title: stuartpykesport: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 22min Coming up it’s Catalans v Warrington from Perpignan in Super League + there’s a cha
item.description: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 22min Coming up it’s Catalans v Warrington from Perpignan in Super League + there’s a channel change! Join me and @RLBarrieMc10 on Sky Sports Action (ch 412 on Sky Q) with kick off at 1800 (UK time) 1 2 652
